title: Validate per-element IDs in destroy methods and role/category arrays
description: Destroy methods (chat_destroy, message_destroy, custom_emoji_destroy, space_ban_destroy, space_invite_destroy) check ids.is_empty() but do not validate that individual array elements are non-empty strings. Similarly, role_ids arrays in SpaceAddMemberInput and SpaceUpdateMemberInput within space_update are not validated per-element. The optional category_id in SpaceAddChannelInput (an ID field) also lacks an empty-string guard. These are all ID parameters that reach the wire and should be validated before any network call.
